title: Austrian companies have vast opportunities to expand trade, investment in India: Prez Murmu
description: NEW DELHI, Apr 16 : President Droupadi Murmu on Thursday said that Austrian companies have vast opportunities to expand trade and investment in India, especially in emerging sectors such as semiconductors, green energy and artificial intelligence (AI). Her assertion came during a meeting with Christian Stocker, Federal Chancellor of the Republic of Austria, who had called on Murmu at the Rashtrapati Bhavan here. Welcoming Stocker on his first visit to India, the President said that India and Austria share close […]

title: Reese Witherspoon Doubles Down on Telling Women to Learn AI
description: Reese Witherspoon is again advising her followers that there's no time like the present to start learning about and using artificial intelligence.
content:
Reese Witherspoon is again advising her followers that there’s no time like the present to start learning about and using artificial intelligence in their daily lives and workplaces.

title: OpenAI announces restricted-access cybersecurity model
description: Artificial intelligence company OpenAI says it will release its latest cybersecurity model to a limited number of partners, after rival Anthropic also restricted release of a new system that uncovered thousands of vulnerabilities. title: AI content should be labelled, heritage committee says
description: A House of Commons committee says the government should require that content generated by artificial intelligence be clearly labelled.
content:
The government should require that content generated by artificial intelligence be clearly labelled, a House of Commons committee said in a new report.
The members of Parliament on the committee are calling for standardized labels for AI content that... [1952 chars]

title: RBC, Scotiabank pull back on climate goals
description: RBC and Scotiabank say they’re dropping their 2030 targets for reducing financed emissions as governments pull back on climate action and artificial intelligence drives a surge in energy demand.
content:
TORONTO — RBC and Scotiabank say they’re dropping their 2030 targets for reducing financed emissions as governments pull back on climate action and artificial intelligence drives a surge in energy demand.

title: AI without regulation will delete jobs
description: UAW President Shawn Fain, Sen. Bernie Sanders and other labor leaders made a call for the regulation of artificial intelligence.
content:
UAW President Shawn Fain joined U.S. Sen. Bernie Sanders to call out artificial intelligence and the companies that develop the technology.
Fain said that unions can negotiate for AI protections, and called for regulation of the tech.
